name: Manicotti
recipeIngredient: 6 manicotti noodles, cooked, rinsed, and drained
1/2 package frozen chopped spinach, thawed and squeezed dry
sauteed in red wine (open a nice bottle and drink the rest)
4 cloves garlic, sauteed with the other ingredients
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Mix the cooked manicotti noodles, thawed spinach, mushrooms (white and shitake), onion, pepper, garlic, Italian herbs, and fat-free cottage cheese in a bowl until well combined.
3. Stuff the mixture into the manicotti shells.
4. Place the stuffed manicotti in a baking dish.
5. Pour one jar of low-sodium spaghetti sauce over the noodles.
6. Bake for 45 minutes at 400°F, or until heated through and bubbly.
Note: The mushrooms were omitted from Ben's meal due to his preference.
